story.text:
# Chronicles — The Mouse Spellbook

Short entries in the spellbook's voice, written as the day runs. One per gate, plus the
setup chronicle that records how this workshop was built.

| File | When | Records |
|------|------|---------|
| `2026-06-19_00_the-setup.md` | before | how the mouse spellbook was set up (this scaffold) |
| `2026-06-19_the-mouse-house-moment.md` | export-ready | the milestone: the kit complete, threaded to root, ready to carry to the mice's machines |
| `2026-06-19_G1_the-narrative-copied.md` | after Steps 1–2 | who the mice are, sigils, packet ingested, conversation opened |
| `2026-06-19_G2_the-31-acts-retold.md` | after Step 3 | each mouse's completed 31-act narrative |
| `2026-06-19_G3_the-proverbs-compressed.md` | after Step 4 | the proverbs and poems surfaced |
| `2026-06-19_G4_the-spells-and-the-patch.md` | after Step 5 | the spell strings, the overlap-check, the personal patches |
| `2026-06-19_G5_the-books-bound-and-woven.md` | after Steps 6–7 | the chapbooks bound + the Mouse Book woven; pinning intents |

`(⚔️⊥⿻⊥🧙)😊`

## The chronicles

- [[Chronicle — The Setup]]
- [[Chronicle G1 — The Narrative Copied]]
- [[Chronicle G2 — The 31 Acts Retold]]
- [[Chronicle G3 — The Proverbs Compressed]]
- [[Chronicle G4 — The Spells and the Patch]]
- [[Chronicle G5 — The Books Bound and Woven]]
- [[Chronicle — The Mouse House Moment]]
- [[Chronicle — Building the Spellbook Wiki]]
